nasb.text: So the Jews said to Him, “You are not yet fifty years old, and have You seen Abraham?”

esv.text: So the Jews said to him, “You are not yet fifty years old, and have you seen Abraham?”

cnv.text: 猶太人對他說：“你還不到五十歲，怎會見過亞伯拉罕呢？”

ccb.text: 犹太人说：“你还不到五十岁，怎么会见过亚伯拉罕呢？”

csbs.text: 犹太人就对他说：“你还不到五十岁，怎么会见过亚伯拉罕？”
